ThingDef.label: Lumiya's Electromesh Suit
ThingDef.description: This light combat suit is used by Nagai operatives. It is highly resistant to blaster fire and is designed to allow the Nagai to fully capitalize on their naturally high dexterity. It cannot be modified, however.

ThingDef.label: twi'lek headband, engineer's
ThingDef.description: Head dressings fit for a Twi'lek.\n\nNOTE: this does not scale correctly with narrow head types!
